name: 高家产房
era_style: 明代中晚期官宦府邸产房
description: 紧急布置的产房，中央产床铺血巾，侧边稳婆药盆与烛台，婴儿襁褓准备就绪，墙壁简洁挂帘，地面青砖，布局紧迫实用，装饰以红色织物和药具为主，营造生死紧张氛围。
visual_reference: Urgent delivery room in Ming dynasty mansion, central birthing bed with blood-stained cloths, midwife's medicine basin and candle stands, prepared swaddling clothes, simple wall curtains, blue brick floor, tense dramatic night lighting, highly detailed historical
lighting: 夜晚烛火摇曳的昏黄光影，投下戏剧性阴影
emotional_range: 早产难产的惊恐到沈词落泪保母的释然
